navigation.structure: Logo left, Nav Links Center, Profile/Actions Right
navigation.surface_strategy: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-b border-black/5)

layout.page_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12
layout.spacing_strategy: Dense and compact for data grids, but generous spacing (p-8) for empty states or standalone cards.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). High contrast (bg-[#002FA7] text-white).
components.cards: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] shadow-none rounded-none p-6. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Use crisp borders (border-collapse, border-b border-[#E4E4E7]). Compact padding for data density. Explicit hover states (hover:bg-[#F4F4F5]).
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Left aligned labels. Sharp edges on inputs.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-in for table rows or grid items.

icons.style: stroke-[1.5] for a precise, technical feel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Hover state color must be explicitly set (e.g., hover:bg-[#F4F4F5] hover:text-[#09090B]).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

login_background.description: Modern building exterior at twilight - use for auth page background with gradient overlay

school_placeholder.description: Exterior view of modern educational building - use as placeholder for school images in Super Admin dashboard

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Ensure the Super Admin view includes strictly: Create School, School List, and Create Admin.
Ensure School Admin view contains: Students, Staff, Attendance, Classes/Sections, Fees, Transport, Frontdesk.
Follow the top-center horizontal navigation strictly. DO NOT implement a sidebar layout.
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Do not use generic fonts like Inter or Roboto.
Apply data-testid to all actionable elements for automated testing.
Adhere to the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) theme: use sharp edges (rounded-none), high contrast, and clean grids. Avoid gradient overloads.
